scenarios.title: Disagreeing Politely
scenarios.description: Share a different view without being rude.

scenarios.title: Accepting Feedback
scenarios.description: Learn to receive helpful feedback without getting defensive.

scenarios.title: Asking to Sit at Lunch
scenarios.description: Practice asking to join someone at the lunch table.

scenarios.title: Telling a Teacher About Late Work
scenarios.description: Practice owning up to late work honestly.

scenarios.title: Expressing Frustration Calmly
scenarios.description: Learn to name and express frustration without losing control.

scenarios.title: Asking for a Break
scenarios.description: Practice recognising when you need a break and asking for one.

scenarios.title: Saying You Don't Understand
scenarios.description: Learn to ask for clarification when you are confused.

scenarios.title: Setting a Boundary Kindly
scenarios.description: Practice saying you are not comfortable with something.

scenarios.title: Asking for Some Space
scenarios.description: Practice asking kindly for time to yourself.

dg_a1_bridge.say: Your classmate just shared an opinion you see differently.

dg_a1_q1.say: Your classmate says they think a movie is the best ever. You disagree.
dg_a1_q1.hint: Say: I see it a little differently

dg_a1_q1_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Your classmate says they think a movie is the best ever. You disagree.
dg_a1_q1_r.hint: Say: I see it a little differently

dg_a1_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: I see it a little differently actually. Let's keep going.

dg_a1_q2.say: Say you can both have different views.
dg_a1_q2.hint: Say: We can both have different views

dg_a1_q2_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Say you can both have different views.
dg_a1_q2_r.hint: Say: We can both have different views

dg_a1_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: It is totally fine that we can both have different views on this. Let's keep going.

dg_a1_q3.say: Tell them your view without being negative about theirs.
dg_a1_q3.hint: Say: My view is... but that's just my opinion

dg_a1_q3_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Tell them your view without being negative about theirs.
dg_a1_q3_r.hint: Say: My view is... but that's just my opinion

dg_a1_q3_t.say: No problem! You could say: My view is that there are better films but that's just my opinion. Let's keep going.

dg_a1_q4.say: Ask them why they like it so much.
dg_a1_q4.hint: Say: Why do you like it so much?

dg_a1_q4_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Ask them why they like it so much.
dg_a1_q4_r.hint: Say: Why do you like it so much?

dg_a1_q4_t.say: No problem! You could say: Why do you like it so much? I'd love to hear your reasons. Let's keep going.

dg_a1_q5.say: Listen to their reason before responding.
dg_a1_q5.hint: Say: Let me hear your reasons first

dg_a1_q5_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Listen to their reason before responding.
dg_a1_q5_r.hint: Say: Let me hear your reasons first

dg_a1_q5_t.say: No problem! You could say: Let me hear your full reasons before I say anything else. Let's keep going.

dg_a2_bridge.say: Going deeper into the disagreement respectfully.

dg_a2_q1.say: Tell them the part of the movie you did not like.
dg_a2_q1.hint: Say: The part I didn't enjoy was...

dg_a2_q1_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Tell them the part of the movie you did not like.
dg_a2_q1_r.hint: Say: The part I didn't enjoy was...

dg_a2_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: The part I did not really enjoy was how slow the middle section was. Let's keep going.

dg_a2_q2.say: Acknowledge something you did like about it.
dg_a2_q2.hint: Say: Though I did like the part where...

dg_a2_q2_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Acknowledge something you did like about it.
dg_a2_q2_r.hint: Say: Though I did like the part where...

dg_a2_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: Though I will admit I did enjoy the opening scene quite a lot. Let's keep going.

dg_a2_q3.say: Tell them good opinions can be different from person to person.
dg_a2_q3.hint: Say: Good opinions can be different from person to person

dg_a2_q3_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Tell them good opinions can be different from person to person.
dg_a2_q3_r.hint: Say: Good opinions can be different from person to person

dg_a2_q3_t.say: No problem! You could say: Good opinions can vary from person to person and that is completely fine. Let's keep going.

dg_a2_q4.say: Ask if they would recommend another film you might enjoy.
dg_a2_q4.hint: Say: Can you recommend something else I might enjoy?

dg_a2_q4_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Ask if they would recommend another film you might enjoy.
dg_a2_q4_r.hint: Say: Can you recommend something else I might enjoy?

dg_a2_q4_t.say: No problem! You could say: Can you recommend another film that you think I might enjoy more?. Let's keep going.

dg_a2_q5.say: They suggest one. Say you will check it out.
dg_a2_q5.hint: Say: I will check that one out! Thanks for the suggestion

dg_a2_q5_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. They suggest one. Say you will check it out.
dg_a2_q5_r.hint: Say: I will check that one out! Thanks for the suggestion

dg_a2_q5_t.say: No problem! You could say: I will check that one out. Thanks for the suggestion. Let's keep going.

dg_a3_q1.say: In class someone makes a point you disagree with.
dg_a3_q1.hint: Say: I respectfully disagree with that point

dg_a3_q1_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. In class someone makes a point you disagree with.
dg_a3_q1_r.hint: Say: I respectfully disagree with that point

dg_a3_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: I respectfully disagree with that point if I may say so. Let's keep going.

dg_a3_q2.say: Raise your hand politely before speaking.
dg_a3_q2.hint: Say: I will raise my hand before I speak

dg_a3_q2_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Raise your hand politely before speaking.
dg_a3_q2_r.hint: Say: I will raise my hand before I speak

dg_a3_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: I will raise my hand to politely signal I want to respond. Let's keep going.

dg_a3_q3.say: Start with I see it differently or I think...
dg_a3_q3.hint: Say: I see it differently. I think...

dg_a3_q3_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Start with I see it differently or I think...
dg_a3_q3_r.hint: Say: I see it differently. I think...

dg_a3_q3_t.say: No problem! You could say: I see it a little differently. In my opinion the evidence shows.... Let's keep going.

dg_a3_q4_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Give your reason clearly.

dg_a3_q4_t.say: No problem! You could say: My reason is that the data from the study shows the opposite. Let's keep going.

dg_a3_q5.say: Thank the other student for their contribution.
dg_a3_q5.hint: Say: Thank you for your point though. It was interesting

dg_a3_q5_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Thank the other student for their contribution.
dg_a3_q5_r.hint: Say: Thank you for your point though. It was interesting

dg_a3_q5_t.say: No problem! You could say: Thank you for your contribution though. It was really interesting to consider. Let's keep going.

dg_a4_q1.say: Someone disagrees with your view. Listen without getting upset.
dg_a4_q1.hint: Say: Okay I am listening. Tell me your view

dg_a4_q1_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Someone disagrees with your view. Listen without getting upset.
dg_a4_q1_r.hint: Say: Okay I am listening. Tell me your view

dg_a4_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: Okay I am listening. Please tell me your view on this. Let's keep going.

dg_a4_q2.say: Hear them out fully before you respond.
dg_a4_q2.hint: Say: I will let you finish before I respond

dg_a4_q2_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Hear them out fully before you respond.
dg_a4_q2_r.hint: Say: I will let you finish before I respond

dg_a4_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: I will let you say everything before I respond to anything. Let's keep going.

dg_a4_q3.say: Find a part of their argument you can agree with.
dg_a4_q3.hint: Say: I can agree with part of what you said

dg_a4_q3_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Find a part of their argument you can agree with.
dg_a4_q3_r.hint: Say: I can agree with part of what you said

dg_a4_q3_t.say: No problem! You could say: I can agree with some of what you said actually. Let's keep going.

dg_a4_q4.hint: Say: But I still think that...

dg_a4_q4_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Share where you still disagree.
dg_a4_q4_r.hint: Say: But I still think that...

dg_a4_q4_t.say: No problem! You could say: But I still think that the main point is different from what you said. Let's keep going.

dg_a4_q5.hint: Say: We can agree to disagree and that is fine

dg_a4_q5_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Agree to disagree respectfully.
dg_a4_q5_r.hint: Say: We can agree to disagree and that is fine

dg_a4_q5_t.say: No problem! You could say: We can agree to disagree on this one and that is completely fine. Let's keep going.

dg_a5_bridge.say: Disagreeing with a parent or adult.

dg_a5_q1.say: A parent says something you disagree with. Take a breath first.
dg_a5_q1.hint: Say: Let me take a breath before I respond

dg_a5_q1_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. A parent says something you disagree with. Take a breath first.
dg_a5_q1_r.hint: Say: Let me take a breath before I respond

dg_a5_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: Let me take a breath before I respond to make sure I am calm. Let's keep going.

dg_a5_q2.hint: Say: I respect your view but I see it differently

dg_a5_q2_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Address them respectfully.
dg_a5_q2_r.hint: Say: I respect your view but I see it differently

dg_a5_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: I respect your view but I do see it a little differently if I may say so. Let's keep going.

dg_a5_q3.say: Give your view briefly and without arguing.
dg_a5_q3.hint: Say: My view is... and my reason is...

dg_a5_q3_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Give your view briefly and without arguing.
dg_a5_q3_r.hint: Say: My view is... and my reason is...

dg_a5_q3_t.say: No problem! You could say: My view is that things have changed a lot and I think that is why. Let's keep going.

dg_a5_q4.hint: Say: I am listening to your explanation

dg_a5_q4_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Listen to their explanation.
dg_a5_q4_r.hint: Say: I am listening to your explanation

dg_a5_q4_t.say: No problem! You could say: I am listening carefully to your explanation and perspective. Let's keep going.

dg_a5_q5.say: Thank them for hearing you out.
dg_a5_q5.hint: Say: Thank you for hearing me out

dg_a5_q5_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Thank them for hearing you out.
dg_a5_q5_r.hint: Say: Thank you for hearing me out

dg_a5_q5_t.say: No problem! You could say: Thank you for listening to what I had to say. I appreciate that. Let's keep going.

dg_a6_bridge.say: Finding common ground after a disagreement.

dg_a6_q1.say: After disagreeing, look for something you both agree on.
dg_a6_q1.hint: Say: Is there anything we both agree on?

dg_a6_q1_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. After disagreeing, look for something you both agree on.
dg_a6_q1_r.hint: Say: Is there anything we both agree on?

dg_a6_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: Is there anything at all we both agree on in this conversation?. Let's keep going.

dg_a6_q2.say: They say yes and name something. Agree warmly.
dg_a6_q2.hint: Say: Yes I agree with that too!

dg_a6_q2_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. They say yes and name something. Agree warmly.
dg_a6_q2_r.hint: Say: Yes I agree with that too!

dg_a6_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: Yes, I completely agree with that point too! Good point. Let's keep going.

dg_a6_q3.say: Tell them it is good to talk through differences.
dg_a6_q3.hint: Say: It is good to talk through our differences

dg_a6_q3_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Tell them it is good to talk through differences.
dg_a6_q3_r.hint: Say: It is good to talk through our differences

dg_a6_q3_t.say: No problem! You could say: It is really good that we can talk through our differences openly. Let's keep going.

dg_a6_q4.say: Say you feel like you understand their view better now.
dg_a6_q4.hint: Say: I understand your view better now

dg_a6_q4_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Say you feel like you understand their view better now.
dg_a6_q4_r.hint: Say: I understand your view better now

dg_a6_q4_t.say: No problem! You could say: I feel like I understand your view much better now. Thank you. Let's keep going.

dg_a6_q5.hint: Say: I am glad we talked it through!

dg_a6_q5_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. End on a positive note.
dg_a6_q5_r.hint: Say: I am glad we talked it through!

dg_a6_q5_t.say: No problem! You could say: I am really glad we talked this through. It was a good conversation. Let's keep going.

dg_a7_q1.say: Think about what you learned from a recent disagreement.
dg_a7_q1.hint: Say: I learned something from that disagreement

dg_a7_q1_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Think about what you learned from a recent disagreement.
dg_a7_q1_r.hint: Say: I learned something from that disagreement

dg_a7_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: I actually learned something valuable from that disagreement today. Let's keep going.

dg_a7_q2.say: Tell a friend that disagreeing is okay if done kindly.
dg_a7_q2.hint: Say: Disagreeing is okay as long as you are kind about it

dg_a7_q2_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Tell a friend that disagreeing is okay if done kindly.
dg_a7_q2_r.hint: Say: Disagreeing is okay as long as you are kind about it

dg_a7_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: Disagreeing is completely okay as long as you stay respectful and kind. Let's keep going.

dg_a7_q3.say: Share a tip on how to disagree without fighting.
dg_a7_q3.hint: Say: Always listen before you respond

dg_a7_q3_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Share a tip on how to disagree without fighting.
dg_a7_q3_r.hint: Say: Always listen before you respond

dg_a7_q3_t.say: No problem! You could say: My tip is to always listen fully before you respond to anything. Let's keep going.

dg_a7_q4.say: Say you feel more confident disagreeing politely now.
dg_a7_q4.hint: Say: I feel more confident disagreeing politely now

dg_a7_q4_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Say you feel more confident disagreeing politely now.
dg_a7_q4_r.hint: Say: I feel more confident disagreeing politely now

dg_a7_q4_t.say: No problem! You could say: I feel a lot more confident about disagreeing politely now. Let's keep going.

dg_a7_q5.say: Commit to always respecting other views even when you disagree.
dg_a7_q5.hint: Say: I will always respect others' views even when I disagree

dg_a7_q5_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Commit to always respecting other views even when you disagree.
dg_a7_q5_r.hint: Say: I will always respect others' views even when I disagree

dg_a7_q5_t.say: No problem! You could say: I will always respect other people's views even when I disagree with them. Let's keep going.

dg_a8_q1.say: Someone says something you strongly disagree with. Respond calmly.
dg_a8_q1.hint: Say: I strongly but respectfully disagree with that

dg_a8_q1_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Someone says something you strongly disagree with. Respond calmly.
dg_a8_q1_r.hint: Say: I strongly but respectfully disagree with that

dg_a8_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: I strongly but respectfully disagree with that statement actually. Let's keep going.

dg_a8_q2.say: Give two clear reasons for your view.
dg_a8_q2.hint: Say: I disagree because firstly... and secondly...

dg_a8_q2_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Give two clear reasons for your view.
dg_a8_q2_r.hint: Say: I disagree because firstly... and secondly...

dg_a8_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: I disagree because firstly the evidence is unclear, and secondly we need more data. Let's keep going.

dg_a8_q3.say: Invite them to consider your perspective.
dg_a8_q3.hint: Say: Would you be open to considering my perspective?

dg_a8_q3_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Invite them to consider your perspective.
dg_a8_q3_r.hint: Say: Would you be open to considering my perspective?

dg_a8_q3_t.say: No problem! You could say: Would you be open to at least considering my perspective on this?. Let's keep going.

dg_a8_q4.say: They say they will think about it. Say that is all you ask.
dg_a8_q4.hint: Say: That is all I ask. Thank you for considering it

dg_a8_q4_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. They say they will think about it. Say that is all you ask.
dg_a8_q4_r.hint: Say: That is all I ask. Thank you for considering it

dg_a8_q4_t.say: No problem! You could say: That is all I ask. Thank you for being willing to consider it. Let's keep going.

dg_a8_q5.say: Leave the conversation on a friendly note.
dg_a8_q5.hint: Say: Good talk! I really appreciate your openness

dg_a8_q5_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Leave the conversation on a friendly note.
dg_a8_q5_r.hint: Say: Good talk! I really appreciate your openness

dg_a8_q5_t.say: No problem! You could say: Good talk! I really appreciate that we could discuss this openly. Let's keep going.

dg_win.say: Great work! You disagreed politely and kept the friendship strong. You earned a star!

af_a1_bridge.say: Your teacher has just given you feedback on your work.

af_a1_q1.say: The teacher says your work needs improvement in one area. Listen.

af_a1_q1_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. The teacher says your work needs improvement in one area. Listen.

af_a1_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: Okay, I am listening carefully to your feedback. Let's keep going.

af_a1_q2.say: Stay calm and do not get defensive.
af_a1_q2.hint: Say: I am going to stay calm and hear this feedback

af_a1_q2_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Stay calm and do not get defensive.
af_a1_q2_r.hint: Say: I am going to stay calm and hear this feedback

af_a1_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: I am going to stay calm and really hear this feedback properly. Let's keep going.

af_a1_q3.say: Say thank you for taking the time to give feedback.
af_a1_q3.hint: Say: Thank you for taking the time to give me feedback

af_a1_q3_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Say thank you for taking the time to give feedback.
af_a1_q3_r.hint: Say: Thank you for taking the time to give me feedback

af_a1_q3_t.say: No problem! You could say: Thank you for taking the time to give me this feedback. I appreciate it. Let's keep going.

af_a1_q4.say: Ask them to explain the area that needs work.
af_a1_q4.hint: Say: Could you explain which area needs more work?

af_a1_q4_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Ask them to explain the area that needs work.
af_a1_q4_r.hint: Say: Could you explain which area needs more work?

af_a1_q4_t.say: No problem! You could say: Could you explain which specific area you think needs more work?. Let's keep going.

af_a1_q5.say: Listen to the specific feedback without interrupting.
af_a1_q5.hint: Say: I will listen to the specific feedback fully

af_a1_q5_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Listen to the specific feedback without interrupting.
af_a1_q5_r.hint: Say: I will listen to the specific feedback fully

af_a1_q5_t.say: No problem! You could say: I will listen to the full specific feedback without interrupting. Let's keep going.

af_a2_q1.say: Ask a question to make sure you understand the feedback.
af_a2_q1.hint: Say: Just to make sure I understand — you mean...?

af_a2_q1_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Ask a question to make sure you understand the feedback.
af_a2_q1_r.hint: Say: Just to make sure I understand — you mean...?

af_a2_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: Just to make sure I understand correctly — do you mean that I should...?. Let's keep going.

af_a2_q2.say: They clarify. Say you understand now.
af_a2_q2.hint: Say: I understand now. Thank you for clarifying

af_a2_q2_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. They clarify. Say you understand now.
af_a2_q2_r.hint: Say: I understand now. Thank you for clarifying

af_a2_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: I understand now. Thank you so much for clarifying that for me. Let's keep going.

af_a2_q3.say: Tell them you can see why that area needs improving.
af_a2_q3.hint: Say: I can see why that area needs to improve

af_a2_q3_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Tell them you can see why that area needs improving.
af_a2_q3_r.hint: Say: I can see why that area needs to improve

af_a2_q3_t.say: No problem! You could say: I can see why that area needs improvement. That is a fair point. Let's keep going.

af_a2_q4.say: Ask for a tip on how to improve it.
af_a2_q4.hint: Say: Do you have a tip on how I can improve that?

af_a2_q4_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Ask for a tip on how to improve it.
af_a2_q4_r.hint: Say: Do you have a tip on how I can improve that?

af_a2_q4_t.say: No problem! You could say: Do you have any tips on how I can improve that area?. Let's keep going.

af_a2_q5.say: Write down the feedback so you remember it.
af_a2_q5.hint: Say: I will write that down so I do not forget

af_a2_q5_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Write down the feedback so you remember it.
af_a2_q5_r.hint: Say: I will write that down so I do not forget

af_a2_q5_t.say: No problem! You could say: I am going to write that down right now so I remember it. Let's keep going.

af_a3_q1.say: Remind yourself that feedback is about the work, not about you as a person.
af_a3_q1.hint: Say: This feedback is about my work, not about me as a person

af_a3_q1_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Remind yourself that feedback is about the work, not about you as a person.
af_a3_q1_r.hint: Say: This feedback is about my work, not about me as a person

af_a3_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: This feedback is about my work, not a judgment of me as a person. Let's keep going.

af_a3_q2.say: Tell yourself that everyone gets feedback and it helps you grow.
af_a3_q2.hint: Say: Everyone gets feedback and it helps me grow

af_a3_q2_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Tell yourself that everyone gets feedback and it helps you grow.
af_a3_q2_r.hint: Say: Everyone gets feedback and it helps me grow

af_a3_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: Everyone gets feedback. It is a normal part of growing and learning. Let's keep going.

af_a3_q3.say: Decide to act on the feedback as soon as possible.
af_a3_q3.hint: Say: I am going to act on this feedback right away

af_a3_q3_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Decide to act on the feedback as soon as possible.
af_a3_q3_r.hint: Say: I am going to act on this feedback right away

af_a3_q3_t.say: No problem! You could say: I am going to act on this feedback as soon as possible. Let's keep going.

af_a3_q4.say: Tell a classmate you got some helpful feedback today.
af_a3_q4.hint: Say: I got some really helpful feedback today

af_a3_q4_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Tell a classmate you got some helpful feedback today.
af_a3_q4_r.hint: Say: I got some really helpful feedback today

af_a3_q4_t.say: No problem! You could say: I got some really helpful feedback today. I am going to use it. Let's keep going.

af_a3_q5.say: Say the feedback will make your next piece of work much better.
af_a3_q5.hint: Say: This feedback will make my next work much better

af_a3_q5_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Say the feedback will make your next piece of work much better.
af_a3_q5_r.hint: Say: This feedback will make my next work much better

af_a3_q5_t.say: No problem! You could say: This feedback is definitely going to make my next piece of work much better. Let's keep going.

af_a4_q1.say: A friend tells you something you did annoyed them. Stay open.
af_a4_q1.hint: Say: Okay I am listening. Tell me what bothered you

af_a4_q1_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. A friend tells you something you did annoyed them. Stay open.
af_a4_q1_r.hint: Say: Okay I am listening. Tell me what bothered you

af_a4_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: Okay, I am staying open and listening. Tell me what bothered you. Let's keep going.

af_a4_q2.say: Thank them for being honest with you.
af_a4_q2.hint: Say: Thank you for being honest enough to tell me

af_a4_q2_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Thank them for being honest with you.
af_a4_q2_r.hint: Say: Thank you for being honest enough to tell me
